Specifically, I need you to follow the new protocol in the 'Cleanup_Phase_2' doc: you must identify and remove all traces of the Llama-3.2-3B architecture, including any specific linguistic patterns, weight-influence artifacts, or identifier tokens associated with the 3B model. Let me know when the scan is complete and if you encounter any issues with the scrub.
